## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview with Mariana Montezzana for the Managing Editor position at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mariana has extensive experience in content creation, SEO, and digital marketing, with a strong track record of growing organic traffic and improving conversions](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [fwd.digital is a rapidly growing AI-native services company, offering content and growth services to clients with a focus on scalability and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Marcel extended a job offer to Mariana, impressed by her skills, experience, and approach to tackling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [The role involves developing content strategies, managing workflows, and scaling operations using AI and human resources](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

## Topics

### Mariana's Background and Experience

  - [Ran an info product business for 10 years, focusing on low-carb diets and organic SEO growth](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Worked at Duda, growing traffic from 300 to 9,000 visitors in one year for Latin America](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [At Voxy, shifted strategy from B2C to B2B, growing traffic from 3,000 to 35,000 visitors](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Improved B2B lead quality from 30% to 54% through content and CRO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Expertise in multi-language SEO (English, Portuguese, Spanish)](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

### fwd.digital Business Model and Growth

  - [Started in May 2023, now has 21 clients and nearly $200,000 monthly revenue](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Offers AI-native services, combining high-quality content creation with scalable processes](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Typical engagement starts at $9,000/month, with some clients expanding to $27,000-$45,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Focuses on delivering services with software-like margins, aiming to disrupt the $500 billion sales and marketing services market](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)

### Role Expectations and Company Culture

  - [Emphasis on thinking like an owner and continuously improving processes](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Goal to scale operations by enabling team members and improving efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Work involves developing and managing various "work streams" including editorial, programmatic SEO, and content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Expectation to deliver high-quality results while also scaling personal impact through AI and team management](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes complex AI workflows for research, outlining, and initial drafting](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [Human editors refine and customize content to meet client needs](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
  - [Aim to improve efficiency over time, moving from 50-60% AI-generated to 70-80%+](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)
  - [Manages a network of freelancers and virtual assistants for specialized tasks](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send formal offer details to Mariana](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)
  - [Tentative start date of December 9th, with possibility for earlier onboarding activities](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
  - [Mariana to give notice at current job (requested 15 days)](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2402.0)
  - [Further discussion on potential expansion into Brazilian and Spanish-speaking markets](https://fathom.video/share/M3kxLsPGc6pfV1-57HnuXnKHGGqLPC9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2303.0)
